name: cap
title: Cap
description: Control Cap screen recorder — start, stop, pause, resume recordings, take screenshots, and manage devices.
author: capsoftware

commands.name: start-instant-recording
commands.title: Start Instant Recording
commands.description: Start an instant screen recording with Cap

commands.name: start-studio-recording
commands.title: Start Studio Recording
commands.description: Start a studio screen recording with Cap

commands.name: start-current-recording
commands.title: Start Recording (Saved Settings)
commands.description: Start a recording using your saved Cap settings

commands.name: toggle-pause-recording
commands.title: Toggle Pause Recording
commands.description: Toggle pause/resume on the current Cap recording
